result.stdout:
Rember v0.0.4
  https://github.com/AntoniosBarotsis/Rember

USAGE
  rember [options]
  rember [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  init              Creates a pre-push git hook. 

  By default the hook will both build and test your code unless specified otherwise with the -b and -t flags.
  Alternatively you can point to a config yml file using the -f flag.

  By default, you will be asked whether you want to run builds and tests which is great if you are using the terminal
  but will probably cause issues with GUIs. Be sure to use the -y flag if you are using GUIs. 

You can run `rember [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Rember v0.0.4
  https://github.com/AntoniosBarotsis/Rember

USAGE
  rember init [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Creates a pre-push git hook. 

  By default the hook will both build and test your code unless specified otherwise with the -b and -t flags.
  Alternatively you can point to a config yml file using the -f flag.

  By default, you will be asked whether you want to run builds and tests which is great if you are using the terminal
  but will probably cause issues with GUIs. Be sure to use the -y flag if you are using GUIs.

OPTIONS
  -b|--build        Only enables the Build task (disables Test) Default: "True".
  -t|--test         Only enables the Test task (disables Build) Default: "True".
  -f|--file         Point to a yml config file Default: "None".
  -y|--yes          Always runs the tasks without asking you. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

USAGE

DESCRIPTION

  By default the hook will both build and test your code unless specified otherwise with the -b and -t flags.
  Alternatively you can point to a config yml file using the -f flag.

  By default, you will be asked whether you want to run builds and tests which is great if you are using the terminal
  but will probably cause issues with GUIs. Be sure to use the -y flag if you are using GUIs.

OPTIONS
  -b|--build        Only enables the Build task (disables Test) Default: "True".
  -t|--test         Only enables the Test task (disables Build) Default: "True".
  -f|--file         Point to a yml config file Default: "None".
  -y|--yes          Always runs the tasks without asking you. Default: "False".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
